ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the employee's profile picture */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title (e.g., Senior Engineer, Engineer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "min_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the job title */,
  "max_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the job title */,
  "is_management" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job title is a management position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current department manager */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "parent_dept_no" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_dept_no FOREIGN KEY ("parent_dept_no") REFERENCES departments ("dept_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "dept_emp" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "dept_no" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working in the department */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped working in the department (or 9999-01-01 if still working) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee within the department */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is currently working in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no", "dept_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "dept_manager" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "dept_no" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started managing the department */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped managing the department (or 9999-01-01 if still managing) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the manager is currently managing the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no", "dept_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Date the salary started being effective */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* Date the salary stopped being effective (or 9999-01-01 if still effective) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the salary is currently effective */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the salary (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no", "from_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started having the job title */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped having the job title (or 9999-01-01 if still having) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job title is currently held by the employee */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the job title change (e.g., promotion, demotion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no", "title_id", "from_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonus" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "bonus_amount" INTEGER /* Bonus amount received by the employee */,
  "bonus_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was received */,
  "reason_for_bonus" TEXT /* Reason for the bonus (e.g., performance, project completion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no", "bonus_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "benefit_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_no", "benefit_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR administrator, manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the performance review was conducted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the employee's performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the performance review */,
  "is_annual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is an annual review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., mid-year, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "emp_no" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the goal is set for */,
  "goal_date" TEXT /* Date the goal was set */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the goal */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress percentage of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_emp_no FOREIGN KEY ("emp_no") REFERENCES employees ("emp_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
